subject: Biology
question: Blood flows through the heart in the following order:
option1: Lungs ⇾ Pulmonary Veins ⇾ Left Atrium ⇾ Mitral Or Bicuspid Valve ⇾ Left Ventricle ⇾ Aortic Valve ⇾ Aorta ⇾ Body
option2: Inferior/Superior Vena Cava ⇾ Right Atrium ⇾ Tricuspid Valve ⇾ Right Ventricle ⇾ Pulmonary Arteries ⇾ Lungs
option3: Body ⇾ Inferior/Superior Vena Cava ⇾ Right Atrium ⇾ Tricuspid Valve ⇾ Right Ventricle ⇾ Pulmonary Arteries ⇾ Lungs ⇾ Pulmonary Veins ⇾ Left Atrium ⇾ Mitral Or Bicuspid Valve ⇾ Left Ventricle ⇾ Aortic Valve ⇾ Aorta ⇾ Body
option4: Body ⇾ Tricuspid Valve ⇾ Right Ventricle ⇾ Pulmonary Arteries ⇾ Lungs ⇾ Pulmonary Veins ⇾ Left Atrium ⇾ Mitral Or Bicuspid Valve ⇾ Left Ventricle ⇾ Aortic Valve ⇾ Aorta ⇾ Body
remarks: Correct answer is "Body ⇾ Inferior/Superior Vena Cava ⇾ Right Atrium ⇾ Tricuspid Valve ⇾ Right Ventricle ⇾ Pulmonary Arteries ⇾ Lungs ⇾ Pulmonary Veins ⇾ Left Atrium ⇾ Mitral Or Bicuspid Valve ⇾ Left Ventricle ⇾ Aortic Valve ⇾ Aorta ⇾ Body"
